urdu transliteration text:
Tere shehr-e se jaate haiWe are leaving your cityEnglish Transliteration
@HujjatELC

Tere shehr-e se jaate hai, dai humko dua nana
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
We are leaving your city,
pray for us O Grandfather (saw)

We will make Karbala flourish
We are leaving your city, pray for us O Grandfather (saw)

urdu transliteration text:
Tera din-e he mushkil me, me kaise raho gar me,Tiflin-e koi wada, Ha tujse kiya nana
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Your religion is in danger, how can I stay home and keep silent,
I made a promise with you when I was a child

urdu transliteration text:
Roze pe tera aake, Ham sham-e jalaa tetheHo ab-e kon-e mujawir hai, Sugra ke siwa nana
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
We used to visit your grave to pay our respect,
There will be no one else here to visit you now apart from Fatima Sughra
The way I have to leave my home helplessly

urdu transliteration text:
Bache hai bohot chota, Garmi ka zamaana haiPohchayenga manzir par, Ab humko khuda nana
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The children are very young and the heat is unbearable,
Only Allah (swt) can help us reach our destination

urdu transliteration text:
Amaa ki lahad chuti, Roza bhi tera chutaUs wakta kaleje par, Khanjar se chalaa nana
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
We have had to leave the grave of my beloved mother and you,
It was unbearably painful like a dagger on our throats
Now the whole world will see her without her veil

urdu transliteration text:
Mere sath me jati hai masoom sakina bhiPardes me howegi usper bhi jafa nana
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
My young Sakina is going with me too,
Many atrocities will be committed upon her too

urdu transliteration text:
Rehan larzta tha markad bhi payamber kaShabbir jo kehte the mai marne chala nana
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The grave of the Prophet would also tremble,
When it heard Husain saying, I am going to get martyred O Grandfather
